name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
update_reason: FCDO no longer advises against all travel to the province of Kasaï Oriental and no longer advises against all but essential travel to the provinces of Kasaï and Kasaï Central, FCDO continues to advise against all travel and all but essential travel to other parts of DRC ('Warnings and insurance' page). Addition of information about Ebola (‘Health’ page).
